creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text: I think the end result of this discussion is that we should land the initial patch to make BEs at the root "work," but we shouldn't really do any filtering or anything like that. This architecture makes a whole lot of sense if you're going to deep BE the whole system, if you see otherwise weird results then there's not a whole lot we can do about that without filtering out perfectly valid BEs on other setups.
